name: Jobvite Talent Acquisition API
what_it_does: Jobvite REST API for enterprise talent acquisition platform. Enables AI agents to query job requisitions, retrieve candidate applications, access pipeline and hiring workflow data, and integrate recruiting intelligence into HR systems. Jobvite is an enterprise ATS platform now part of Employ Inc., combining ATS with CRM recruiting capabilities.
use_cases: Querying job requisition status and candidate pipeline from talent analytics agents
Retrieving candidate application and screening data from HR reporting agents
Accessing hiring workflow and approval status from recruiting automation agents
Integrating Jobvite data into HRIS and payroll systems from HR workflow agents
not_for: Automated candidate decisions without human HR oversight
best_when: An enterprise HR team using Jobvite wants AI agents to surface pipeline metrics, track time-to-hire, and integrate recruiting data into HRIS and workforce planning workflows.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Candidate data including applications, assessments, and interview notes is highly sensitive. EEOC compliance required for any automated screening logic.

auth.notes: Jobvite API key authentication. API keys from Jobvite admin settings. Require Jobvite enterprise account and API access agreement.

pricing.paid_tiers: Employ Inc. enterprise pricing (Jobvite, JazzHR, NXTThing RPO)
pricing.notes: Enterprise ATS now part of Employ Inc. Pricing negotiated. API access requires agreement.

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Candidate PII and hiring data is highly sensitive — EEOC compliance required
No public MCP server — REST API requires enterprise agreement
API documentation is limited for non-partner accounts
Jobvite is part of Employ Inc. — API may share patterns with JazzHR
Rate limits undocumented — throttle for bulk candidate queries
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY: Enterprise candidate data including applications and interview notes. SOC2, GDPR. EEOC compliance for screening. API key enterprise-only.

security_score_components.security_notes: Enterprise candidate hiring data. SOC2, GDPR. EEOC compliance required for automated screening.
